description: 500 pre-1920 historic mines on BLM and USFS public land in the Rocky Mountain region. Covers major gold, silver, and copper districts across Colorado, Montana, Wyoming, and Idaho. All entries are from documented historic mining operations established before 1920 and located on publicly accessible federal land.
